mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PARENT_ID, STORAGE_YARD_NM, SHORT_CD, AREA, STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD, IS_INNER_STORAGE_YARD, UNIT_AREA_TON, IS_RENT, WORK_AREA_CD, SORT_NUM, STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME FROM M_STORAGE_YARD
ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, BHT_ID, PARENT_ID, STORAGE_YARD_NM, SHORT_CD, AREA, STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD, IS_INNER_STORAGE_YARD, UNIT_AREA_TON, IS_RENT, WORK_AREA_CD, SORT_NUM, STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME FROM M_STORAGE_YARD
BHT_ID = #{bhtId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_STORAGE_YARD( ID, PARENT_ID, STORAGE_YARD_NM, SHORT_CD, AREA, STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD, IS_INNER_STORAGE_YARD, UNIT_AREA_TON, IS_RENT, WORK_AREA_CD, SORT_NUM, STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, BHT_ID, IS_BONDED_AREA, IS_FRONTIER, position_name )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storageYardNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shortCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{area, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageYardTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isInnerStorageYard, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitAreaTon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isRent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workAreaCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{storageYardLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, STORAGE_YARD.nextval, #{isBondedArea, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isFrontier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{positionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_STORAGE_YARD SET STORAGE_YARD_NM = #{storageYardNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHORT_CD = #{shortCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AREA = #{area, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD = #{storageYardTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_INNER_STORAGE_YARD = #{isInnerStorageYard, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UNIT_AREA_TON = #{unitAreaTon, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, IS_RENT = #{isRent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_AREA_CD = #{workAreaCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = #{storageYardLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, IS_FRONTIER = #{isFrontier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_BONDED_AREA = #{isBondedArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, position_name = #{positionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ID = #{id}
